# pAssets Overview

> What pAssets are, how they differ from pETH, which ones are live today, and how new pAsset markets get added.

Canonical URL: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/passet-catalog
Markdown URL: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/passet-catalog.md
Section: Understand Polaris

Documentation index: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms.txt
Full documentation bundle: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt

---

A **pAsset** is a synthetic debt asset issued directly from the Polaris protocol against pETH collateral. **pETH is different:** it is the bonding-curve collateral token that backs pAssets, not a debt asset issued from a borrow position.

> **Current Public Testnet 1 focus:** pUSD and pGOLD are Testnet-active on Sepolia. See [Launch Status](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/launch-status) for the live list.

## Live pAssets

Asset | Tracks | Status | Notes

**pUSD** | US dollar | **Testnet-active** | The flagship pAsset. See [pUSD](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pusd).
**pGOLD** | 1 ounce of gold | **Testnet-active** | Decentralized gold exposure, backed by pETH rather than bullion. See [pGOLD](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pgold).
**pETH** | ETH | **Testnet-active collateral** | *Special.* Not issued from a borrow position: it is the collateral itself, produced by the [bonding curve](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/peth). It backs every other pAsset.

## New pAsset markets

Polaris is **debt-asset agnostic**: it can issue a synthetic pegged to any asset with robust reference pricing and risk parameters, and external teams can build new pAsset markets on the shared pETH collateral base. See [Launch a pAsset](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/launch-a-passet).

Next steps:
- [pUSD](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pusd): The flagship dollar-pegged pAsset.
- [pGOLD](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/pgold): Decentralized gold exposure backed by pETH.
- [Launch a pAsset](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/minting/launch-a-passet): How external teams add a new pAsset market.
